lore.english:
Taimanin. Hails from the renowned head house of the Fuuma clan.

Because of her powerful Evil Eye, she went through a difficult childhood, being forced into war. Her father, Gonsho was afraid of her, but Danjo, the former head of the clan, was intrigued by her power, and raised her as a killing machine. Now she seeks to serve as a secretary of Kotaro, the current head of the clan, much to Tokiko's disapproval.

She possesses the Evil Eye known as Dotengan. Her left mechanical prosthetic hand was implanted during a UFS surgery, which enables her to fire a blast of energy from a hole in her palm.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&HP] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase HP of All allies by 20% in Arena
skills.description_readable: Increase HP of All allies by 20% in Arena

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Taimanin Art: Magpie[-]
skills.description:
Throws 6 shurikens consecutively at the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:60103]%)[-] [&Weaken] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:60103]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:60103] turn(s)
When the character's [&HP] is [&Color_Cyan]50%[-] or less, performs 1 [&Common_Word_Skill_AddAttack].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ATKCOSTHP]
skills.description_readable:
Throws 6 shurikens consecutively at the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with (19.5%) Weaken at a 5% chance.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
When the character's HP is 50% or less, performs 1 Additional Attack.
Damage increases in proportion to HP lost.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Fuuma Martial Art: Skyfall[-]
skills.description:
On [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnStart], removes [V3:60201] [&DeBuff](s) the character has.
On [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnStart], if the character has no [&DeBuff]s, gains [&Color_Cyan]([V3:60202]%)[-] [&Strengthen].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:60202] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
On Turn Start, removes 1 Debuff(s) the character has.
On Turn Start, if the character has no Debuffs, gains (24%) Power-up.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Dotenrin: Heavenly Reverse[-]
skills.description:
Smites the ground, attacking [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] [A:603] times.
Grants [&Color_Cyan]([V3:60303]%)[-] [&DmgReflect] to [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:60303] turn(s)
If the character's HP is less than [&Color_Cyan]75%[-], the effect increases to [&Color_Cyan][V3:60302]%[-].
skills.description_readable:
Smites the ground, attacking ALL enemies [A:603] times.
Grants (7.5%) Damage Reflect to ALL allies.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
If the character's HP is less than 75%, the effect increases to 9%.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Evil Eye: Dotenrin[-]
skills.description:
Damage taken to the character is reduced by [&Color_Cyan][V3:60401]%[-].
If the character's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]50%[-], the efficacy becomes [&Color_Cyan][V3:60402]%[-].
skills.description_readable:
Damage taken to the character is reduced by -5%.
If the character's HP is less than 50%, the efficacy becomes -7.5%.

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_601]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_602]
skill_data.name_readable: <Android Arm Secrecy> Fuuma Martial Art: Skyfall
skill_data.description:
On [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnStart] absorbs [&Color_Cyan]([V3:61202]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of the enemy with the strongest [&ATK] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:61202]%[-] chance.
On [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnStart], removes [V3:61201] [&DeBuff] on the character.
skill_data.description_readable:
On Turn Start absorbs (12.5%) Turn Gauge of the enemy with the strongest ATK at a 50% chance.
On Turn Start, removes 1 Debuff on the character.

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_602]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_603]
skill_data.name_readable: <Android Arm Type Zero> Dotenrin: Heavenly Reverse
skill_data.description:
Smites the ground, attacking [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] [A:613] time(s).
Grants [&Shield] equal to [&Color_Cyan][V3:61303]%[-] of ally Max. [&HP] to [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:61302] turn(s)
If the target HP is less than [&Color_Cyan]75%[-], the effect increases to [&Color_Cyan][V3:61302]%[-].
skill_data.description_readable:
Smites the ground, attacking ALL enemies [A:613] time(s).
Grants Shield equal to 15% of ally Max. HP to ALL allies.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
If the target HP is less than 75%, the effect increases to 18%.
